title: Payhip Alternatives for Restricted Countries: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Imagine you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, eager to sell ebooks, courses, or art, but PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are all blocked in your country. You're not alone. Many creators face similar restrictions, hindering their ability to reach customers and get paid. In this post, we'll explore the limitations of these platforms and why they're not suitable for restricted countries. We'll also dive into the world of crypto-native infrastructure and how it offers a permanent structural alternative for creators like you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Payhip, a popular platform for selling digital products, offers a range of features, including customizable sales pages, email marketing tools, and analytics. However, its limitations become apparent when dealing with restricted countries. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have strict requirements and may freeze or suspend accounts without notice. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure, such as Unchained Commerce, provides a seamless and automated experience, allowing creators to sell digital products without the need for a bank account or ID verification.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have strict country restrictions, which can leave creators in restricted countries without a viable option for selling digital products. These platforms may not explicitly state their country restrictions, making it difficult for creators to understand the risks involved. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure is designed to work across borders, providing a more inclusive and accessible solution for creators in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, crypto-native infrastructure offers a more favorable option. With Unchained Commerce, creators can receive payments in minutes, compared to days or weeks with traditional payment processors. Additionally, crypto-native infrastructure eliminates the need for intermediaries, reducing transaction fees and increasing the creator's take-home pay. This is especially important for creators in restricted countries, where access to traditional payment processors may be limited.
Crypto-native infrastructure eliminates the need for bank accounts and ID verification, making it easier for creators in restricted countries to get paid.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are critical components of any e-commerce solution. Unchained Commerce's crypto-native infrastructure provides seamless and automated delivery of digital products, eliminating the need for manual intervention. This not only saves time but also reduces the risk of errors and lost sales. With Unchained Commerce, creators can focus on what matters most – creating great content and building a loyal customer base.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

In conclusion, the limitations of PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip make them unsuitable for creators in restricted countries. Crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, offers a permanent structural alternative that's designed to work across borders. How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
